creator: nk@nkeor.me
text:
Digging into the ZFS source code, arcstats.p might've been removed in https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/commit/a8d83e2a24de6419dc58d2a7b8f38904985726cb. It's still present in v2.1.12 as far as I can see.

This mightn't actually be related to netdata not responding imo.

I'm working on updating the port to 1.40.0 in review D40418, I hope this is resolved then.
